structure_integrity.name: structure_integrity
structure_integrity.notes: 结构化章节数量越多且越稳定，得分越高。

evidence_traceability.name: evidence_traceability
evidence_traceability.notes: 证据条数、章节内证据绑定越充分，得分越高。

risk_reasonableness.name: risk_reasonableness
risk_reasonableness.notes: 存在核验提示通常意味着风险判断更谨慎可解释。

recommendation_usefulness.name: recommendation_usefulness
recommendation_usefulness.notes: 建议越具体、条数越充足，基础得分越高。
